title: Quarantine and Medical Expenses in Repatriation Due to Epidemic or
content: 14 Pandemic. In case of an epidemic or pandemic declared by the World Health 15 Organization (WHO), the shipowner/principal or LMA shall be responsible for medical 16 care expenses and board and lodging for periods spent by seafarers in self-isolation or 17 quarantine, whether or not the seafarers have symptoms, have been exposed or are 18 quarantined as a safety precaution for the community, until the seafarers have been duly 19 repatriated to the point of hire. 20 21 When the shipowner/principal or LMA primarily responsible for the above medical and 22 quarantine expenses fail to fulfill their obligations, the DMW shall shoulder the said 23 expenses using the AKSYON Fund, subject to reimbursement from the responsible 24 shipowner/principal or LMA. 25 26 Upon arrival at the point of hire until the seafarer's return to the place of domicile, the 27 Department shall bear the cost of medical care and quarantine expenses, following the 28 whole-of-government approach in the management of epidemics and pandemics. 29 30
